title: cluster-reduce output
description:
Result of running the user's reducer on the cluster + pulling its single JSON output.

The ``reduced`` field is the parsed JSON the reducer wrote,
surfaced inline so the agent doesn't need to re-read the local
file.

run_id.description: Run identifier — typically YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-<short_sha>. Loose validation (bare ``str``); the strict-pattern check belongs on input specs, not on outputs that may surface legacy or migrated sidecars.
run_id.title: Run Id

output_path_remote.description: Path on the cluster where the reducer wrote its output (relative to remote_path or absolute).
output_path_remote.title: Output Path Remote

output_path_local.description: Local path the reducer's output was rsync_pulled to.
output_path_local.title: Output Path Local

reduced.description: Parsed reducer output (whatever JSON shape the reducer wrote).
reduced.title: Reduced
